contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 420
- Description: *OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*
  
  - *Tokenomics / QR pipeline:* batch QR web logic is consolidated; *QR Code Sales* and Telegram→sheet handling got stricter (duplicates, IGNORED rows, cash collector / sold-by)—fewer bad rows and a clearer ledger handoff.
  - *DApp:* batch *QR manager* flow improved with a picker and *shareable URL params*—faster ops when handling many codes.
  - *Hit List / email:* warmup drafts use a richer Grok prompt (rainforest, QR trees, flexible paths); the *Beer Hall digest preview* script is now in *go_to_market* for repeatable reviews.
  - *truesight.me:* whitepaper handbooks, SunMint, real diagrams, and *View Whitepaper* labels remain the public face from recent merges.
  - *Community:* Edgar shows new sales and contribution lines (field work, checkout triage). Link in the next message.
  
  Details + links in the next message.
  
  *Shipped*
  
  - tokenomics: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/218 (and #211–#217 in window as applicable)
  - dapp: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/151 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/150
  - go_to_market: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/44 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/43
  - truesight_me_beta: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/9 … https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/16 (whitepaper stack)
  - agentic_ai_context: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/13
  - Community (Telegram log): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qbZZhf-_7xzmDTriaJVWj6OZshyQsFkdsAV8-pyzASQ/edit — pick 1–4 plain lines from recent rows; skip digest echo rows if deduping.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 700.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
